llm_keywords.evidence: |I| changes from 6.899103373692976e-103 A at +0.1 V to 2.3994540300343092e-05 A at -6 V, corresponding to about 97.43 decades.

At matched high voltages, |I| is similar on both sides: 2.3994540300343092e-05 A at -6 V versus 2.2494143112878067e-05 A at +6 V; 1.7440846641591838e-54 A at -0.2 V versus 1.7312649183077767e-54 A at +0.2 V.
The overall |I| envelope rises with |V|, for example from 6.6186841031785665e-15 A at -1.0 V to 1.7789642201467646e-09 A at -2.0 V to 1.8114885409403392e-06 A at -4.0 V.

Small reversals are present at adjacent points, such as on the positive side where |I| changes from 9.62893587930369e-09 A at 2.25 V down to 8.279256709853086e-09 A at 2.30 V, then up to 1.3324456709792607e-08 A at 2.35 V.
ln(|I|/V^2) becomes much more negative as |V| decreases, from about -14.22 at -6 V to about -230.38 at -0.1 V, and from about -14.29 at +6 V to about -230.63 at +0.1 V.
